entries.description: Being devout vaishnavites by religion, the main source of protein for the Bisnupriya Manipuris are dairy produce. Hence they rear cattle.
The Indian water buffalo serves the Bishnupriya Manipuris in farming activities. Mostly maintained in a pair to draw ploughs in the field
Dogs are naturally allowed to be in any Bishnupriya Manipuri village and are cared for by all.
Cats are also allowed to be and cared for to prevent rodents away from the barns in any Bishnupriya Manpuri houseold.
